name: foundry
description: Opinionated senior-engineer toolkit for Kotlin / Spring Boot: 6 producer agents (system-analyst, architect, teamlead, code-implementor, qa-engineer, termination-handler), methodology / clean-code / DDD / testing / architecture skills, adversarial review commands, end-of-turn sound hook, 4-bucket change workflow (.spec/changes/{backlog,in-progress,done,declined}/) with per-stage tracking (6 stages) + /workflow orchestrator and long-lived standards/.
